title: build_scribal_school_graph data payload
description: v0.22.0 joint scribal-signature + provenance clustering. Returns connected-components of a graph whose nodes are tablets with BOTH a cached scribal LLR signature AND a known find-spot city, and whose edges connect pairs at signature cosine ≥ min_scribal_similarity AND (optionally) sharing the same provenance city. Each component above min_school_size = a scribal-school candidate — empirically reconstructed from orthographic-preference + physical co-location, awaiting downstream philological evaluation. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

school_id.description: Arbitrary stable identifier within this response (e.g. 'school-001'). NOT a canonical scribal-school name — purely an output-stream label.

anchor_tablet.description: Member tablet with the highest sum of within-cluster cosine scores. Conventional 'name' of the school for downstream reference.

period.description: From cached fragment-metadata script.period; null when metadata missing.

primary_genre.description: From cached fragment-metadata genres[0]; null when metadata missing. May be a hierarchy string like 'Literature → Lex → Diri'.

shared_provenance.description: City/site shared by all members when unique (e.g. 'Nineveh'). Null when required_shared_provenance=false produced a multi-city component.

internal_cohesion.description: Mean pairwise scribal-signature cosine across collected intra-cluster edges. Higher = the school's members share more idiosyncratic orthographic preferences.

edge_count.description: Number of distinct intra-cluster edges (pairs at ≥ min_scribal_similarity that satisfied the provenance rule).

candidates_with_signature_and_city.description: Tablets that passed the sign-count filter, had a known city, AND had a cached scribal signature (the edge-construction universe).

candidates_without_city.description: Tablets that passed sign-count filter but had no city in cached fragment-metadata. Reported so users know how much corpus was excluded for metadata-coverage reasons; enrich via enrich_prefix_metadata to recover.

candidates_without_signature.description: Tablets that had a city but no scribal signature (e.g. below MIN_TABLET_SIZE or all-X-token signs).

tablets_scanned_for_edges.description: Seeds for which findSameScribeCandidates was actually called (after pre-filters).

components_above_size_threshold.description: Connected components with ≥ min_school_size members (before top_k_schools truncation).
